testcase.name: populationHR_works_as_expected_for_default_parameters

error.message: Error: Unable to obtain draws from the fit object. ('test-populationHR.R:6:5')

testcase.error: Error: Unable to obtain draws from the fit object. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─base::suppressWarnings(populationHR(object = mp)) at test-populationHR.R:6:5 2. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 3. └─jmpost::populationHR(object = mp) 4. ├─base::t(...) 5. └─jmpost::SurvivalQuantities(...) 6. ├─jmpost::generateQuantities(object, generator = generator, type = "survival") 7. └─jmpost:::generateQuantities.JointModelSamples(...) 8. ├─utils::capture.output(...) 9. │ └─base::withVisible(...elt(i)) 10. └─model$generate_quantities(data = data, fitted_params = object@results) 11. └─cmdstanr:::process_fitted_params(fitted_params) 12. └─base::tryCatch(...) 13. └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 14. └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 15. └─value[[3L]](cond)

testcase.name: populationHR_works_as_expected_for_alternative_specfications

error.message: Error: Unable to obtain draws from the fit object. ('test-populationHR.R:57:5')

testcase.error: Error: Unable to obtain draws from the fit object. Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─jmpost::populationHR(...) at test-populationHR.R:57:5 2. ├─base::t(...) 3. └─jmpost::SurvivalQuantities(...) 4. ├─jmpost::generateQuantities(object, generator = generator, type = "survival") 5. └─jmpost:::generateQuantities.JointModelSamples(...) 6. ├─utils::capture.output(...) 7. │ └─base::withVisible(...elt(i)) 8. └─model$generate_quantities(data = data, fitted_params = object@results) 9. └─cmdstanr:::process_fitted_params(fitted_params) 10. └─base::tryCatch(...) 11. └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 12. └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 13. └─value[[3L]](cond)
